items.title: Blackjack Exile
items.description: New game mode: play 21 against the dealer in private rooms with up to 5 seats and guest bots.

items.title: Bets and payouts
items.description: Place chip bets each round with hit, stand, and double-down. Naturals pay 3:2 and the dealer stands on 17.

items.title: Card-back skins at the table
items.description: Blackjack uses the card-back skin you pick on the home screen, just like the poker table.

items.title: Stage scales to your screen
items.description: The blackjack table scales to fit your screen, so laptops see the whole table without scrolling.

items.title: One code, the right game
items.description: Invite codes now route to poker, UNO, or blackjack automatically from the home page.

items.title: Online rooms live
items.description: Players can join the same Firebase room by invite code.

items.title: Guest bots
items.description: Guest seats now auto-play from the host browser.

items.title: Table reactions
items.description: Added a seat-side emoji reaction wheel with shared table reactions and outside-click dismissal.

items.title: Wider game header
items.description: Moved room details and table controls toward the screen edges while keeping the main table layout centered.

items.title: All-in turn flow
items.description: Betting rounds now handle all-in players correctly, keep action on players who still need to respond, and use accurate all-in action text.

items.title: Blind rotation
items.description: Dealer, small blind, and big blind now move to the next eligible seat when a new hand starts.

items.title: Hidden cards
items.description: Fold-ended hands keep hole cards private by default, with an end-of-hand option to reveal your own cards to the table.
